productDisplayName: Baggit Women Copper Rapchik Viva Mobile Pouch
description: Style NoteWorry no longer about managing money, cards, mobile phone and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish mobile pouch from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or tuck it away in your bag.Product DetailsCopper mobile pouch with two main zip compartments, has a fabric bow in the frontConcealed magnetic closures that hold two sides of the pouch togetherTwo card holders, one photo id card holderA zippered pocket on the backMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeLength: 9 cmsWidth: 15 cms
